text.tspan: Contribution to global mean surface temperature rise by gas, World, 1851
The global mean surface temperature change as a result of a country or region's cumulative emissions of three gases – carbon
Note: This does not include cooling impacts from sulphur dioxide and aerosols, so the net warming can be lower.
